# mtverse

mtverse is a curated catalog of free and premium website templates for developers, founders, agencies, and product teams. The catalog includes Next.js dashboard templates, React admin dashboards, ecommerce templates, SaaS and landing page templates, portfolio templates, and responsive HTML website templates.

Template detail pages provide screenshots, framework and technology information, included features, license terms, pricing, and live previews when available. Free downloads require an account and follow the limit shown on the pricing page. Paid ZIP downloads require the signed-in account that owns the matching purchase entitlement.

## Primary pages

- https://www.mtverse.dev/
- https://www.mtverse.dev/templates
- https://www.mtverse.dev/html-templates
- https://www.mtverse.dev/pricing

## Template categories

- https://www.mtverse.dev/template-categories/dashboards
- https://www.mtverse.dev/template-categories/ecommerce
- https://www.mtverse.dev/template-categories/landing
- https://www.mtverse.dev/template-categories/html

- https://www.mtverse.dev/template-hubs/nextjs-dashboard-templates
- https://www.mtverse.dev/template-hubs/react-admin-dashboard-templates

- https://www.mtverse.dev/template-hubs/landing-page-templates
- https://www.mtverse.dev/template-hubs/free-html-templates
- https://www.mtverse.dev/template-hubs/portfolio-html-templates
- https://www.mtverse.dev/template-hubs/saas-templates
- https://www.mtverse.dev/template-hubs/agency-website-templates

- https://www.mtverse.dev/about

- https://www.mtverse.dev/privacy
- https://www.mtverse.dev/refund-policy
- https://www.mtverse.dev/editorial-policy

## Catalog facts

- A single-template purchase unlocks only the purchased template.
- Free template limits and paid template prices are documented on the pricing page.
- Bundle purchases include only the catalog and future updates described for that bundle.
- Download access is connected to the customer's signed-in account.
- Live previews are demonstrations; the downloadable ZIP is the licensed source package.
